message:
feat(engine): add deep enrichment tests for regime signature and timescale separation

Add 207 new integration tests across two modules:

- regime_signature_feature (97 tests): trace observation edge cases,
  signature extraction boundaries, L1 distance/cosine similarity,
  regime classification with custom configs, state chart composition,
  centroid verification, evidence harness, bundle writer, stress tests,
  constants cross-referencing, bucket normalization

- timescale_separation_certificate (110 tests): ratio basis, negative
  intervals, convergence/variance/gain severity, multi-pair signals,
  witness construction, assessment levels, large-scale stress (10+
  controllers), telemetry scenarios, detection epoch propagation,
  Display completeness, end-to-end pipeline, determinism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
